message:
feat: add Draft status variant for pre-execution issues

Add a new `Draft` status to the Status enum for issues that are not yet
ready for execution. Draft shares visual styling with Deferred (blue
color, deferred icon) and is tracked separately in stats summary via
`draft_issues`. Wired through model, formatting, theme, and stats code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -167,6 +167,7 @@ pub struct StatsSummary {
     pub closed_issues: usize,
     pub blocked_issues: usize,
     pub deferred_issues: usize,
+    pub draft_issues: usize,
     pub ready_issues: usize,
     pub tombstone_issues: usize,
     pub pinned_issues: usize,

@@ -56,7 +56,7 @@ pub const fn format_status_icon(status: &Status) -> &'static str {
         Status::Open => icons::OPEN,
         Status::InProgress => icons::IN_PROGRESS,
         Status::Blocked => icons::BLOCKED,
-        Status::Deferred => icons::DEFERRED,
+        Status::Deferred | Status::Draft => icons::DEFERRED,
         Status::Closed => icons::CLOSED,
         Status::Tombstone => icons::TOMBSTONE,
         Status::Pinned => icons::PINNED,
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ pub fn format_status_label(status: &Status, use_color: bool) -> String {
         Status::Open => label.green().to_string(),
         Status::InProgress => label.yellow().to_string(),
         Status::Blocked => label.red().to_string(),
-        Status::Deferred => label.blue().to_string(),
+        Status::Deferred | Status::Draft => label.blue().to_string(),
         Status::Closed | Status::Tombstone => label.grey().to_string(),
         Status::Pinned => label.magenta().bold().to_string(),
         Status::Custom(_) => label.to_string(),
@@ -101,7 +101,7 @@ pub fn format_status_icon_colored(status: &Status, use_color: bool) -> String {
         Status::Open => icon.green().to_string(),
         Status::InProgress => icon.yellow().to_string(),
         Status::Blocked => icon.red().to_string(),
-        Status::Deferred => icon.blue().to_string(),
+        Status::Deferred | Status::Draft => icon.blue().to_string(),
         Status::Closed | Status::Tombstone => icon.grey().to_string(),
         Status::Pinned => icon.magenta().bold().to_string(),
         Status::Custom(_) => icon.to_string(),

@@ -118,7 +118,7 @@ impl Theme {
             Status::Open => &self.status_open,
             Status::InProgress => &self.status_in_progress,
             Status::Blocked => &self.status_blocked,
-            Status::Deferred => &self.status_deferred,
+            Status::Deferred | Status::Draft => &self.status_deferred,
             Status::Closed | Status::Tombstone => &self.status_closed,
             Status::Pinned => &self.status_pinned,
             Status::Custom(_) => &self.muted,

@@ -37,6 +37,7 @@ pub enum Status {
     InProgress,
     Blocked,
     Deferred,
+    Draft,
     Closed,
     #[serde(rename = "tombstone")]
     Tombstone,
@@ -54,6 +55,7 @@ impl Status {
             Self::InProgress => "in_progress",
             Self::Blocked => "blocked",
             Self::Deferred => "deferred",
+            Self::Draft => "draft",
             Self::Closed => "closed",
             Self::Tombstone => "tombstone",
             Self::Pinned => "pinned",
@@ -70,6 +72,12 @@ impl Status {
     pub const fn is_active(&self) -> bool {
         matches!(self, Self::Open | Self::InProgress)
     }
+
+    /// Returns true if the issue is in draft state (not yet ready for execution).
+    #[must_use]
+    pub const fn is_draft(&self) -> bool {
+        matches!(self, Self::Draft)
+    }
 }
 
 impl fmt::Display for Status {
@@ -87,6 +95,7 @@ impl FromStr for Status {
             "in_progress" | "inprogress" => Ok(Self::InProgress),
             "blocked" => Ok(Self::Blocked),
             "deferred" => Ok(Self::Deferred),
+            "draft" => Ok(Self::Draft),
             "closed" => Ok(Self::Closed),
             "tombstone" => Ok(Self::Tombstone),
             "pinned" => Ok(Self::Pinned),

@@ -119,7 +119,7 @@ impl Theme {
             Status::Open => self.status_open.clone(),
             Status::InProgress => self.status_in_progress.clone(),
             Status::Blocked => self.status_blocked.clone(),
-            Status::Deferred => self.status_deferred.clone(),
+            Status::Deferred | Status::Draft => self.status_deferred.clone(),
             Status::Closed => self.status_closed.clone(),
             Status::Tombstone | Status::Custom(_) => self.muted.clone(),
             Status::Pinned => self.highlight.clone(),
